description: Background-less text button with optional leading/trailing icons. Used for lightweight actions within content areas, callouts, and inline contexts. Supports on-bright and on-dim color contexts.

intent.description: Color intent. systemic = neutral text colors, brand = theme primary colors.

size.description: Size variant. Controls height, typography, icon size.

surface.description: Surface context. bright = light background (dark text), dim = dark background (light text).

iconLeading.description: Leading icon slot. Sized internally per size variant.

iconTrailing.description: Trailing icon slot. Sized internally per size variant.

loading.description: Shows centered spinner, hides content, disables interaction.

disabled.description: Inactive state. Prevents interaction, reduces text opacity.

asChild.description: Radix Slot — renders child element with component styles.

hover.description: Text + icon color changes (no background overlay). See variants.intent color tables.

pressed.description: Text + icon color changes. See variants.intent color tables.

focused.all: 2px border semantic-primary-300 (absolute inset overlay, focus-visible only)

disabled.description: Text + icon color changes to low-opacity. pointer-events-none + aria-disabled.

loading.description: Content masked/invisible, spinner centered. Interaction disabled.

interactableArea.description: Visual layout follows Figma exactly, but actual clickable area is expanded beyond the visible bounds using ::after pseudo-element or negative inset technique for better touch/click targets.

noBackground.description: No background color, no border, no padding. Only text + icons with gap.

colorContext.description: onDim prop switches between on-bright and on-dim color sets. This determines whether the button is on a light or dark background.

implementation.stateOverlay: None — no background, so no overlay span. Color changes only via hover:/active: pseudo-classes on text/icon color.
implementation.loadingStrategy: Content marked invisible, Spinner absolute centered. pointer-events-none + aria-disabled + aria-busy.
implementation.interactableArea: ::after pseudo-element with negative inset (e.g., -4px) for expanded hit area beyond visible text bounds.
implementation.focusStrategy: focus-visible only. 2px ring semantic-primary-300 via absolute inset overlay.
implementation.tokenReuse: none — independent token set. TextButton has unique height/icon sizes different from Button.
